name: A Bet Is a Bet
description: Meet Lakrissa in Baldur's Gate.

name: A Foul and Awesome Display
description:
You can find A Foul and Awesome Display at the Steel Watch Foundry.
Class: Sage
Task: Use Wulbren's runepowder bomb.

name: A Guide to Avernus - One Hellish Holiday
A List of Essential Personnel
description: You can get A List of Essential Personnel on top of a desk in House of Hope.

name: A Massacre Beyond Imagining
description:
You can find A Massacre Beyond Imagining at the Steel Watch Foundry.
Class: Haunted One
Task: Annihilate the Steel Watch Foundry with Wulbren's secret weapon.

name: A Modest Guide to Sword Cost Wine
A Tour of Tempest
description: On a balcony connected to the Archive, atop a padded ottoman in the House of Hope.

name: Abdel's Trusted Shield
description:
Location: Golbraith's Cellar (X: -152, Y:-64)
Players receive it from Golbraith, after talking with him. Tell him you can help his son and insist to take it from there. He will gift you Abdel's Trusted Shield

name: About Creation of Orphic Hammer
description: About Creation of Orphic Hammer holds the lowdown on the Orphic Hammer, where it came from, how it was crafted, and what mischief it's meant for.

name: Alfira
description: Alfira is a Tiefling bard, that is having trouble finding inspiration to complete her song.

name: Amulet of Greater Health
description: You can take Amulet of Greater Health from a pedestal in House of Hope.

name: Amulet of the Windrider
description:
Location: Lower City.
Quest: You need to save Vanra in quest Save Vanra (Help the Hag Survivors) and. (Throw Hag's Bane on the hag.)
You might have to talk to the mom first for her to reward you after Vanra returns.

name: Anti-Hag Support Group Poster
description: On ground

name: Aquisitions
description: On table, second floor, Flood Tide Allandra Grey's quaters

name: Cazador Szarr
description: Cazador Szarr will be encountered in the Cazador's Dungeon, Lower City. Your interactions with him will be affected by whether or not Astarion is in your party. Your actions will end in Combat.

description: Pass the DC10 Wisdom and DC20 Intelligence checks to reveal a hidden Door. Inside, you'll find the Helldusk Helmet (very rare), and Staff of Spellpower (very rare). You'll also spot Mol's Contract and Tav's Contract if you accept Raphael's offer.

description: You can loot Infernal Iron at Flymm's Cargo Basement.

description: Cabinet in basement.

description: We found a very disoriented merchant called Arves loitering outside a building. We should find out what happened to him. Maybe they'll have answers inside.

description: Jannath's Hat can be looted from a High-Security Vault No.2 at The Counting House.

name: Khalid's Gift
description: Insert Harp-Shaped Pin to reveal the entrance. The pin can be found on the 2nd floor of this building. Then find the key under loose Planks. Jaheira's gear is hidden behind the bookcase

name: Markoheshkir
description: Go to the lower level by jumping from the balcony (Use something to prevent fall damage). Find the interactive plate (Needs See Invisibility) with the inscription "Below", interact with it to teleport at the bottom, disable the shield using arcane (Alternatively, use the lever to pass a DC20 check and disable the shield.).

name: Masters of the Painterly Arts
description: Table in upstairs hallway.

name: Maude
description: Can be found at the entrance to the cemetery.

name: Mayrina
description:
Located in the attic of the building.
Connected Quest(s): Save Vanra.
Additional Information: Upon reaching the attic, you encounter Mayrina, who has been transformed into a sheep. Engage in conversation using a spell or potion to discover that she is under a curse. After dismantling the voodoo doll, the curse is lifted, and Mayrina shares the recipe for the Hag's Bane potion.

name: Merchant's Almanac: The Coast Way
description: Highberry Townhouse

name: Nina Dortmell
description: Positioned at the cemetery entrance. Additional Information: Nina endeavors to revive her brother through Myrkul's powers. You can either support her decision or persuade her to halt. Opting for the former results in combat against the inadvertently resurrected undead.

name: Omeluum
description: Omeluum is a Mind Flayer that broke free of its Elder Brain with its (scarcely found) arcane talents. If its associated quest is completed, it will sell you a ring that completely suppresses the wearer's tadpole.

description: Discovered concealed in a flower pot, a Perception Check of 15 is necessary. The corresponding lock is linked to a Gilded Chest situated behind Omotola.

name: Opulent Chest

name: Opulent Chest
description: Made of precious stone and covered in gold, this chest is both sturdy and pleasing to the eye. Gilded Chest is a Misc Item in Baldur's Gate 3.

name: Oskar Fevras
description:
Located in the master bedroom of Jannath's Estate.
Related Quest: Free the Artist.
Additional Details: The character will be present if you successfully freed him in Act 1. Initially possessed, Jannath will request you to incapacitate him.

name: Passage
description: Press the button located across the vast hall, leaving one character by the door on the opposite side.

name: Passage
description: Locked passage on the floor.

name: Path to the prison
description: Secret door that leads to prison.

name: Pelorsun Blade
description: Cazador's Dungeon - In the intersection past the elevator, Open the door to the right and use Misty Step/Mobility to reach the broken walkway below, Open the door, Weapon can be found inside the Rosewood Casket.  Be wary to disarm the trap on the casket before opening it.  As of Patch 2.0 and Hotfix #6, the dirt mound adjacent to the casket is bugged and cannot be dug up.  Some players suggest the casket itself is supposed to be implied to have been unearthed from the mound.

name: Perks of the Trade
description: Get a rebate for your room at the Elfsong Tavern

name: Plank
description: Perception 15. On the rooftop.

12-16 Poltergeists - Level 8

description: Save Hope is a Quest in Baldur's Gate 3. Save Hope can be acquired during Act 3 in House of Hope.

name: Saverok's Horned Helmet
description: Can be found within the Bhaalist Crypt

name: Scrapbook of Letters
description: Wooden Chest, Flymm's Cobblers upstairs

name: Scribbled Note
description: On Tamara.

name: Sea Memorial
description: Offer something during the Water Queen's funeral procession.

name: Sebastian
description: Once you find a way to descend to Cazador's Dungeon from the Szarr Palace, approach the large Crypt door. You can use the Szarr Family Ring again on this door when prompted. This will open the door to the next room. You can interact with the people in the cells. Observe the cell to the right and you will encounter Sebastian.

name: Secret Stash
description: You can find Secret Stash at the Heapside Prison.

name: Security Breach
description: Security Breach is a Lore Item in Baldur's Gate 3.

name: Seeking Letter of Credit
description: Table in basement.

name: Shabby Door
description: Leads to Elerrathin's Home

name: Silver-Tongue's Better Than Any Key
description: Gain access to Avery's workshop.

name: Simple Letter
description: Can be found in the mailbox.

name: Skittle
description: You can find Skittle at the Heapside Prison.

name: Small Gilded Chest
description: (DC15) to unlock.

name: Soot-Stained Letter
description: On Avery.

name: Sorcerous Vault
description: Sorcerous Vault is a sub-location of Sorcerous Sundries.

name: Soul Coin
description: Soul Coin can be looted in the House of Hope.

name: Spaceshunt Boots
description:
Location: Wine Festival, Lower City
Drop by: Dolor the assassin

name: Spell Savant Amulet
description: Spell Savant Amulet can be found inside a High-Security Vault No.1 in The Counting House, Lower City.

name: Staff of Spellpower
description: In the House of Hope in a vault behind a hidden door. (Near the entrance to the Boudoir. A DC10 Wisdom check is required to activate the Inert Infernal Gem and then a DC20 Arcana check to open the door.)

name: Staff of the Ram
description: In an Opulent Chest in Jaheira's Basement (Insert Harp-Shaped Pin to reveal the entrance) under Elerrathin's Home in the Lower City.

name: Steel Watch Titan
description:
You can face Steel Watch Titan.

You will encounter:
Steel Watcher Titan - Level 12
3x Hellfire Watcher - Level 11

name: Steel Watcher Arm
description: Ingredient to craft Hellfire Engine Crossbow

name: Steelwatcher Helmet
description: Location: On a table in the Steel Watch Foundry, Lower City

name: Stock Display: A Primer, by Sana Aeran
description: Behind Omotola on the counter.

name: Stopping the Repetition of History
description: Defeat Lorroakan.

name: Strange Beggar Sacrum
description: Look around the Graveyard and you will find a strange man called Strange Beggar Morbus, the man appears to be playing hide-and-seek with his sister. You can smell the scent of rot from this person, even death.

name: Supplications to Umberlee
description: On table outside of kitchen area.

name: Sword Coast Songbook
description: Sword Coast Songbook is a Lore Book Item in Baldur's Gate 3.

name: Sword Coast Songbook
description: Side table upstairs.

name: Sword of Chaos
description: Can be found within the Bhaalist Crypt

name: Tadpole
description: Can be found in the basement of the Blushing Mermaid. (X-2336, Y-120)

name: Taming Hope: Part One
description: Taming Hope: Part One can be found in Archive at House of Hope.

name: Taming Hope: Part Two
description: You can get Taming Hope: Part Two in House of Hope's Boudoir.

name: Targeting Module
description: Ingredient to craft Hellfire Engine Crossbow

name: Tarhun Mnemonis
description:
Entrance to Lady Jannath's Estate.
Quest: Free the Artist.

name: Tate
description:
Found in the upstairs bedroom of Elerrathin's Home.
Additional Information: Contains a Harp-Shaped Pin, intended for the Pin Slot in Jaheira's Study.

name: Tear-stained Letter
description: Highberry Townhouse, upstairs

name: Teddybears Ready for Collection
description: In the mailbox.

name: The Amiable Art of Necromancy
description: Top floor balcony

name: The Annals of Karsus
description: Can be found in the Sorcerous sundries valults.

name: The Bhaalspawn Saga: Part II
description: Can be found on a wooden desk in Jaheira's Basement

name: The Butler's Cane Has A Knob On The End
description: Outdoor balcony.

name: The Fall of Netheril
description: In House of Hope, look for a rosewood desk in the Archive.

name: The Forgotten Forest
description: Elerrathin's Home, upstairs bedroom.

name: The Glitter Gala - Glittering Baldur's Gate for over Twenty Years
description: Corner table in The Glitter Gala.

name: The Last Will and Testament of Julio Facemaker
The Long Arm of the Gur
description: The Long Arm of the Gur can be found inside a High Security Vault Number 3 at The Counting House.

name: The Nautiloid Adventurers
description: In the Archive of the House of Hope, posted on a board, you can find The Nautiloid Adventurers.

name: The News of My Deeds Was Greatly Exaggerated
description: Rig the Baldur's Mouth printing press.

name: The Path to Elminster
description: Sorcerous Sundries

name: The Power of the Crown
description: In the House of Hope, look for a stack of books in the Archive.

name: The Quarta Sune
description: The Quarta Sune is a Lore Item in Baldur's Gate 3.

name: The Red Knight's Final Stratagem
description: In the Sorcerous Vault, you'll find it secured within a Display Case requiring a Sleight of Hand check of DC 20 to unlock. Reading its contents not only awards XP but also bestows the Scroll of Artistry of War

name: The Stone Lord: A New Threat
description: You can find The Stone Lord: A New Threat at the Heapside Prison.

name: The Tharchiate Codex
description: Secured within a Display Case in Elminster Vault, requiring a DC 20 check. Perusing its contents will inflict the curse of Tharchiate Withering, diminishing the Constitution score by 5. Yet, employing Remove Curse will subsequently impart Tharchiate Vigour, providing 20 temporary hit points until the next Long Rest.

name: The Tourmaline Depths
description: In the House of Hope, look for a stack of books in the Archive.

name: The Ultimate State
description: Flymm's Cobblers upstairs

name: Threatening Letter
description: In the mailbox.

name: Thrumbo
description: Found inside the wardrobe of a dilapidated house. Associated with the quest 'Find the Mystic Carrion's Servant.

name: To Durinbold Mausoleum
description: Leads to Durinbold Mausoleum

name: To Gorion Mausoleum
description: Leads to Gorion Mausoleum

name: Tombstone Shop Key
description: Drops from doppelganger; Wine Festival

name: Tormented Soul
description: You will face Tormented Soul - Level 8 when you destroy the haunted Golden Candelabrum.

name: Tormented Soul
description: You will face Tormented Soul - Level 8 when you destroy the haunted Golden Candelabrum.

name: Traveller's Chest
description: Locked.

name: Treasure Pile
description: You can find Treasure Pile in the Water Queen's Cellar. Triggers the spawning of enemies when stealing.

name: Trident of The Waves
description: Trident of The Waves can be found inside a High Security Vault no.4 at The Counting House.

name: Underbelly Diplomat
description: Gain access to the Undercellar.

name: Unflinching Protector Amulet
description: Dropped by: Ptaris in The Lodge - Basement Docks (You can only meet him if you give the Githyanki egg to  Lady Esther. Quest Steal a Githyanki Egg)

name: Unsent Letter
description: Can be found behind the locked wooden wall in the atelier.

name: Unsent Sending
description: Can be found in a loose plank (Perception Check 10).

name: Unwanted Masterwork Gauntlets
description: In a chest in the basement of Forge of the Nine, Lower City.

name: Unwanted Masterwork Greaves
description: Looted from a chest in the basement of the Forge of the Nine, Lower City.

name: Upcoming Knife Fights
description: Cabinet in basement.

name: Urgent Communications
description: Commune with the Netherbrain.

name: Vault Chest Key
description: Vault Chest Key can be found on a desk in The Counting House.

name: Veil of the Morning
description:
Location: Philgrave's Mansion
Merchant: Mystic Carrion

name: Vellioth
description: Is an inanimate skull. Successfully passing dialog checks provides information about its past. It drops a scroll containing important information about the ritual.

name: Vengeful Soul
description: You will face Vengeful Soul Level 8 when you destroy the haunted Golden Candelabrum.

name: Veronica Hamperclips and her Adventures Beyond The Washbin
description: Can be found next to the wicker basket.

name: Veteran's Hotspot
description: Purchase a room at the Elfsong Tavern

name: Viconia DeVir
description: Viconia DeVir can be found in Cloister of Sombre Embrace.

name: Viconia DeVir
description:
Encounter at the Cloister of Sombre Embrace against:
1× Viconia DeVir  - (Level 11)
2× Justiciar - (Level 9)
1× Sentry Fredrichk - (Level 7)
5× Sharran Fidelian - (Level 7)
8x Sharran Novice - (Level 4)
3× Sharran Sentry - (Level 5)

name: Viconia's Walking Fortress
description: Viconia's Walking Fortress can be looted in Cloister of Sombre Embrace.

name: Wall of the Faithless
description: Wall of the Faithless can be obtained in the Archive of the House of Hope, on a stack of books.

name: Watcher Crossbow Blueprint
description: Ingredient to craft Hellfire Engine Crossbow

name: Weave Button
description: This button will take you to the Sourcerous Sundries Vault.

name: What Remains of the Dead
description: Guide Nina to acceptance or prowess.

name: Wooden Chest
description: You can loot the Wooden Chest from behind the sandstone wall in the Water Queen's Cellar.

name: Wooden Chest
description: (DC15) to unlock.

name: Wooden Chest
description: (DC15) to unlock.

name: Wooden Chest
description: Behind breakable wall. (DC15) to unlock.

name: Writ: High Alert
description: You can find Writ: High Alert at the Heapside Prison.

name: Your New Ring
description: Second floor office.
